description_long: This is a compact, tactical-style shotgun with a short barrel and a black synthetic finish. The shotgun features a pistol grip with a smooth, ergonomic curve and a ribbed pump-action fore-end for secure handling. Along the top, there is a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and a shell carrier is attached to the side, holding extra shotgun shells for quick reloading. The barrel is relatively short, making the weapon suitable for close-quarters use, and the overall design is streamlined with minimal protrusions. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The finish is matte black, giving the shotgun a modern, utilitarian appearance.
description: A compact, black pump-action shotgun with a pistol grip, short barrel, and side shell carrier, designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, pistol grip, ribbed pump, Picatinny rail, and side shell carrier.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel opening, and the width of the pump and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pump, grip, and the shell carrier from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the pistol grip and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a short, vented rib and no visible secondary barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
